name: Riverwood Resort
address: 1313 E Broomfield Rd, Mt Pleasant, MI 48858
about: Riverwood Resort is a comprehensive leisure destination featuring a 36-hole championship golf course, a 24-lane bowling center, and a dedicated golf simulator facility. The venue provides both outdoor and indoor golf experiences, along with event hosting capabilities and on-site lodging at The Villas. The golf simulator area, branded as Swing Suite, is integrated within a resort setting that includes dining options and event spaces, making it a versatile location for both serious practice and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Integrated within a 36-hole championship golf course resort
Dedicated simulator facility with party packages and leagues
Convenient booking through their online tee-time system
Part of a multi-activity destination for non-golfers in the group

food_and_drink.notes: Available on-site at 989 Bar & Grill with a full menu

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own equipment for the simulator experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The resort has an on-site restaurant and bar (989 Bar & Grill), but outside food and drink policies for the simulator area are not detailed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator session, as pricing and time details are found on their booking page.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Riverwood Resort is family-friendly with bowling lanes, villa lodging, and event spaces suitable for children and families.
